## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem. Ex: "I'm always frustrated
when ..."

## Describe the solution you'd like

What you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Other approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Component

Which part of PipelineMind does this touch?
[ingestion / retrieval / agent / api / ui / monitoring / docs]

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.
